response.justification: Bogdan brings extensive seniority and highly relevant domain experience in geospatial data platforms (GISCollective) and high-throughput distributed systems. However, his recent technology stack is heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, lacking the recent Modern C++ or Rust expertise strictly required for this specific routing pipeline role.
strengths: Strong domain expertise in geospatial data platforms, GIS applications, and map data processing.
Proven ability to build low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated flexibility and willingness to learn new tools, aligning with the requirement to expand technical expertise.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with Modern C++ or Rust, the primary languages required for the role.
No direct experience mentioned with routing algorithms, real-time traffic signal integration, or specific navigation guidance systems.
Recent roles are predominantly full-stack and web-focused rather than heavily focused on deep backend C++/Rust data pipelines.
